Honors & Awards

  • 2023
    Ranked 26th - Iranian Nationwide University Entrance Exam for Masters in CS - National Educational Testing Organization
  • 2024
    Ranked 41st - Iranian Nationwide University Entrance Exam for Masters in CS - National Educational Testing Organization
  • 2022
    Bronze Medalist - International Blockchain Olympiad (IBCOL) - IBCOL
  • 2022
    Gold Medalist - National Blockchain Olympiad - Iran
  • 2020
    Ranked 125th among 155,000+ - Nationwide University Entrance Exam (Konkur) - National Educational Testing Organization
  • 2018, 2019
    Gold Medal - Provincial Chess Championship - Iran
  • 2014
    Top 1% - NODET Entrance Exam (Ranked in top 120 of 11,000+) - National Organization for Development of Exceptional Talents
